'''kamuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seabat|seabat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seabat|seabat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kamuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæmiyith|kæmiyith]] || [[word:kæmiyij|kæmiyij]] || [[word:kæmiyish|kæmiyish]] || [[word:kæmiyi|kæmiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kamumuyuth|kamumuyuth]] || [[word:kamumuyuj|kamumuyuj]] || [[word:kamumuyush|kamumuyush]] || [[word:kamumuyu|kamumuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kamuyuth|kamuyuth]] || [[word:kamuyuj|kamuyuj]] || [[word:kamuyush|kamuyush]] || [[word:kamuyu|kamuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kamufyuth|kamufyuth]] || [[word:kamufyuj|kamufyuj]] || [[word:kamufyush|kamufyush]] || [[word:kamufyuf|kamufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kamuyuthu|kamuyuthu]] || [[word:kamuyuju|kamuyuju]] || [[word:kamuyushu|kamuyushu]] || [[word:kamuyuku|kamuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kamuyuth|kamuyuth]] || [[word:kamuyuj|kamuyuj]] || [[word:kamuyush|kamuyush]] || [[word:kamuyu|kamuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kamuyuthul|kamuyuthul]] || [[word:kamuyujul|kamuyujul]] || [[word:kamuyushul|kamuyushul]] || [[word:kamuyukul|kamuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kamuyuthuthu|kamuyuthuthu]] || [[word:kamuyujuju|kamuyujuju]] || [[word:kamuyushushu|kamuyushushu]] || [[word:kamuyuku|kamuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kamuyuthun|kamuyuthun]] || [[word:kamuyujun|kamuyujun]] || [[word:kamuyushun|kamuyushun]] || [[word:kamuyukun|kamuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kamuyuthuoro|kamuyuthuoro]] || [[word:kamuyujuoro|kamuyujuoro]] || [[word:kamuyushuoro|kamuyushuoro]] || [[word:kamuyukuoro|kamuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
